text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=d491ae3853001bf91450016501b1ab627bb8b083

commit d491ae3853001bf91450016501b1ab627bb8b083
Author:     Cy Schubert <cy@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-07-29 11:10:08 +0000
Commit:     Cy Schubert <cy@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-07-29 11:14:21 +0000

    sysutils/syslog-ng: Correct dependency

    Syslog-ng now depends on devel/pcre2 instead of devel/pcre. This
    was missed when upstream's patch updating the port was submitted.

    PR:             272789
    Fixes:          c0c1145055f0

 sysutils/syslog-ng/Makefile | 3 ++-
 1 file changed, 2 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)
